scripts/record-autoconfig-demo.py.title: Password Assignment
scripts/record-autoconfig-demo.py.description: Hardcoded passwords are a critical vulnerability.
scripts/record-autoconfig-demo.py.fix: Move to environment variable or secrets manager

scripts/record-autoconfig-demo.py.title: Agent: LLM Output Directly Triggers Actions
scripts/record-autoconfig-demo.py.description: LLM output directly triggers side-effect actions without validation. Hallucinated or injected outputs can cause unintended actions.
scripts/record-autoconfig-demo.py.fix: Validate LLM output against expected schemas before executing side effects. Add human confirmation for irreversible actions.

scripts/record-autoconfig-demo.py.title: No Rate Limiting on Authentication
scripts/record-autoconfig-demo.py.description: Auth endpoints without rate limiting are vulnerable to brute-force attacks.
scripts/record-autoconfig-demo.py.fix: Add rate limiting: express-rate-limit, @upstash/ratelimit, or Cloudflare rules

scripts/record-autoconfig-demo.py.title: SSRF: Internal IP Pattern
scripts/record-autoconfig-demo.py.description: Internal IP address in code. Verify it is not reachable via user-controlled URLs.
scripts/record-autoconfig-demo.py.fix: Block private IP ranges in URL validation for user-supplied URLs

web/blueprints/wizard.py.title: RAG: Internal Metadata Exposed in Response
web/blueprints/wizard.py.description: Internal document metadata (file paths, sources, authors) returned in API responses. Leaks information about the knowledge base structure.
web/blueprints/wizard.py.fix: Strip internal metadata before returning responses. Only expose necessary fields to the client.
